subcodes.first_line: O thou who circlest the precincts of the Concourse on High! Raise thy hands in supplication toward the threshold of the exalted Lord and offer thy prayer [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طائف مطاف ملأ اعلى دست نیاز بدرگاه خداوند بلند کن و مناجات نما که اى بى
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @the concourse on high
